有亲人，有朋友，甚至还有个名叫苏沐雪的青梅竹马。
但说到底，这只是款游戏罢了。
直到……直到有一天我突然发现自己竟然拥有了“超能力”！
自己的那位青梅竹马苏沐雪竟然也出现在自己面前！
云阳这才发现，这游戏……好像特么的是真的！
——————————————————————
我叫苏沐雪，身为女帝的我重生了，重生到自己十六岁时刚要踏入修仙界的时候。
既然重生了，那前世的遗憾，受到的苦难，我都要一一弥补和报复回来！
第一个该死的，就是这个和自己一同踏入修仙界，然后一脚把自己踢入深渊的青梅竹马——云阳！
只不过，这一世的云阳……好像有点不一样？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3662a7fee8f1c2a60032ecb243cb14ba","author":"笔名都得用生僻字了吗","author_id":"","book_id":"7477554232099343384","book_name":"论如何偿还欠的一万好感度","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7477613744776806936","read_count":"56934","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"471689"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"216","tags":"都市修真,都市,重生,女帝,灵气复苏,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6dbca72e2cf611bbe080f1089c1712ee~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437099&x-signature=ro0q4VvDkyJSrvKLyZTrRSmrfis%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4262158239019763","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"177"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160459B9A7ACAAED916AFAD181"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count"
